description_long: This stereo sound system consists of a central subwoofer unit and two satellite speakers, all featuring a dark wood-textured exterior. The subwoofer has a prominent circular speaker opening on the front, with a control panel above it that includes several buttons and a small display. The two satellite speakers are rectangular and connected to the subwoofer by visible black cables. The rear of the subwoofer reveals multiple ports and connectors, including RCA jacks and a power input, as well as a small display or label area. The speaker grilles are black and cover the front faces of the speakers, providing a sleek contrast to the wood finish. The overall design is compact and suitable for placement on a desk, shelf, or entertainment center in an urban environment.
description: A compact stereo sound system with a wood-textured subwoofer and two black-grilled satellite speakers, connected by cables. The front features a control panel and speaker opening, while the back has multiple ports and connectors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the subwoofer's speaker opening, control panel, and both satellite speakers with black grilles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the subwoofer and one satellite speaker, with visible connecting cables.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the subwoofer's ports, connectors, and a small display or label area, along with the backs of the satellite speakers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the subwoofer and satellite speaker, with cables trailing behind.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white logo is visible on the upper front panel of the subwoofer, featuring a stylized symbol and some text.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are solid black with a fine mesh texture, covering the entire front face of each speaker and subwoofer opening, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the upper front of the subwoofer, featuring several round buttons and possibly a small display or indicator above the speaker opening.
